description: A scientist is conducting NumExperiments different experiments to produce electricity. Each experiment i produces ElectricityProduced[i] units of electricity and requires specific amounts of NumResources types of resources as defined by ResourceRequired[j][i]. The laboratory has ResourceAvailable[j] units of each resource available. The scientist aims to determine the number of each experiment to conduct in order to maximize the total electricity produced.

ResourceRequired.description: Amount of resource j required for experiment i

ElectricityProduced.description: Amount of electricity produced by experiment i
